text:
— 

LONG NAME: EPRSCRB_SRVC_CD 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 2 

SOURCE: NCDPD DataQ™ 

VALUES: 01 = Site does not accept NCPDP SCRIPT Transactions 
02 = Site accepts NCPDP SCRIPT Transactions 
Null/missing = This information has not been reported by the pharmacy. 

COMMENT: This variable is new in 2012. This information is optional, and not required to be reported by 
pharmacies to NCPDP. 

Additional details regarding the National Council for Prescription Drug Programs (NCPDP) source data 
are
